name: Molded Christmas Cookies
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: These cookies are made with a special rolling pin or cookie cutters.
1. Beat eggs until very light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add sugar; beat for 15 minutes. Do not underbeat.
3. Fold in anise extract and flour.
4. Roll dough to 3/8-inch thickness.
5. Thoroughly flour the springerle mold or rolling pin.
6. Press molds firmly into the dough.
7. Cut cookies apart and place on a greased and floured cookie sheet.
8. Let dry overnight at room temperature, covered with paper towels or uncovered.
9. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
10. Place cookies in the oven and immediately reduce temperature to 300 degrees F (150 degrees C).
11. Bake for 15 minutes. Cookies should not brown.
12. Store cookies for 2 to 3 weeks to mellow flavor. These cookies are very hard and may be used for dunking in coffee, tea, or cocoa.
13. For Christmas, paint designs with egg yolk colored with food coloring. Makes 6 dozen.
